title: New Initiative to Simplify Train Travel to London Airports

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
A new initiative is set to enhance train travel to London airports by expanding the tap-in, tap-out payment system across south-east England. This development aims to make ticket purchasing more convenient, accessible, and flexible for passengers traveling to airports such as Heathrow and Gatwick.

The improved system will help travelers secure the best fares while increasing the efficiency of their journeys. This initiative is part of broader efforts to modernize transport links across the UK, including connections to areas like Scotland's Highlands and Islands, where aviation has played a vital role since the inter-war period.

sourceReferences.citationText: dft-press-office – Simpler train travel to London airports as tap-in, tap-out expanded across south-east England
